name: Chocoberry Splash
recipeInstructions:
1. Place milk, thawed frozen strawberries with syrup, and 2 tablespoons of vanilla ice cream into the blender container.
2. Cover and blend on medium speed until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into a tall glass filled with ice.
4. Add club soda and stir gently.
5. Top with a scoop of vanilla ice cream.
6. Garnish with additional fruit, if desired.
7. Serve immediately.
One 12-ounce serving.
